name: M:GTA.Math.Quaternion.AngleBetween(GTA.Math.Quaternion,GTA.Math.Quaternion)
summary: Returns the angle in degrees between two rotations a and b.
returns: The angle in degrees between two rotations a and b.

params.name: a
params.description: The first quaternion to calculate angle.

params.name: b
params.description: The second quaternion to calculate angle.
